executor_steps: Remove the AGREE annex block from the process type doors_process
Add a new AGREE annex block to the process implementation doors_process.imp
In the new implementation annex, add assume statements that express the same signal flow relationships using only visible identifiers from the process type
The assume statements should be: D1_handle_position => door1.handle_position, D1_closed => door1.closed, D2_handle_position => door2.handle_position, D2_closed => door2.closed
